disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absolute refusal of all food and fluid for the past 48 hours in a chronically declining frail older man
trigger_question_examples: When did he last eat or drink anything?
Has he been able to take any fluids at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He hasn't had a single thing to eat or drink for two days now. He just turns his head away when I try.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New and worsening confusion over the past week, a change from his usual state
trigger_question_examples: Has his thinking or confusion changed recently?
Is he more muddled than he normally is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's much more confused than he usually is — this last week he hasn't really made sense and now he barely knows what's going on.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New inability to stand or bear weight, now completely bedbound after a week of decline
trigger_question_examples: Can he still stand or walk at all?
When did he last get out of bed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He can't stand at all now. A week ago he could still get to the chair with help, but now he's stuck in the bed and I have to do everything for him.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced responsiveness — drowsy, mostly asleep, barely engaging
trigger_question_examples: Is he awake and responding to you?
Can you rouse him and get him to answer you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's mostly asleep and when I talk to him he takes a long time to answer, if he answers at all. He just wants to be left alone.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dry mouth and lips, consistent with not drinking
trigger_question_examples: Does his mouth or lips look dry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His lips and mouth look really dry and cracked. I can't remember when he last used the toilet properly.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Six-month history of significant unintentional weight loss, unresponsive to nutritional supplements
trigger_question_examples: How long has he been losing weight?
Have the shakes made any difference?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's been wasting away for about six months. We've been giving him the high-calorie shakes but they haven't made any difference — he just keeps getting thinner.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On long-term preventative medicines — blood pressure tablets and a statin — still being taken
trigger_question_examples: What regular medicines is he on?
Is he still taking his blood pressure and cholesterol tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's still on his blood pressure tablets and his cholesterol tablet, and some vitamins. I've been trying to get them into him but he barely swallows anything now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Very low mood and social withdrawal alongside the physical decline
trigger_question_examples: Does he seem to have withdrawn or given up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His mood has been very flat and he's completely withdrawn. He says he just wants to be left alone. It's like he's given up on everything.
